description_long: This is a compact, rectangular USB flash drive with a matte black plastic casing and the brand name 'TOSHIBA' printed in white on the top surface. The device features a standard USB-A male connector at one end, which is used for plugging into computers or other compatible electronic devices. The body is slightly rounded at the edges, providing a comfortable grip for insertion and removal. The opposite end of the USB connector is flat and solid, likely housing the internal memory chip and controller. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible buttons, lights, or moving parts. This object is typically used for portable data storage and transfer in urban environments such as offices, schools, or homes.
description: A black TOSHIBA USB flash drive with a rectangular shape, white branding, and a standard USB-A connector for portable data storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat end of the flash drive with the TOSHIBA logo visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim, elongated profile and the USB-A connector extending from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the USB-A connector and the flat, solid back of the device.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the flash drive and the white TOSHIBA branding.
